case_title: BRAD FOO VS. LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-01-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF BRAD FOO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY BRANDON RATTAN, ASSISTANT STORE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,250.00 FILED BY FOO, BRAD AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOO, BRAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC $4,625.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,715.00, DISTURBING OLD PAINT FROM FASCIA BOARDS WAS AN INCIDENTAL AND FORESEEABLE RESULT OF PLAINTIFFS CONTRACT WITH DEFENDANT FOR THE REPLACEMENT OF GUTTERS ON PLAINTIFF'S HOME. THE EXPENSE FOR RESTORING THE PAINT SHOULD BE SHARED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2017 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $279.02 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOO, BRAD AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED) SERVED JUL-25-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $297.11 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC
